summary: Live-applied ADR 0294 from the isolated `codex/ws-0294-live-apply` worktree on top of repository version `0.177.112` by hardening the Docker bridge, PostgreSQL, firewall, and Ollama recovery paths that surfaced during truthful replay, converging One-API with its repo-managed Ollama backend dependency, and re-verifying the unified OpenAI-compatible lane end to end through One-API, Open WebUI, and ServerClaw.

verification.check: Focused branch validation for the recovery and contract surfaces
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_one_api_runtime_role.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_linux_guest_firewall_role.py tests/test_ollama_runtime_role.py tests/test_postgres_vm_role.py tests/test_postgres_vm_access_policy.py` returned `37 passed in 2.46s`, and `make syntax-check-one-api` passed from the branch worktree.

`make converge-one-api` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=192 changed=2 failed=0`, `localhost : ok=3 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=58 changed=5 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0` after the playbook converged `ollama_runtime` before `one_api_runtime`.

verification.check: Controller-side bootstrap verification and provider contract generation
verification.observed: The settled bootstrap report records `verification_passed: true`, managed root user `root / LV3 Platform Root`, chat probe excerpt `READY`, embedding dimensions `768`, available models `gpt-4.1-mini`, `gpt-4o-mini`, and `text-embedding-3-small`, the three governed Ollama-backed channels, and both downstream provider env files present.

The generated provider env files point Open WebUI at `http://host.docker.internal:8101/v1` and ServerClaw at `http://10.10.10.20:8101/v1`, preserving a single repo-managed OpenAI-compatible contract while keeping One-API private.

`make converge-open-webui` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=125 changed=6 failed=0` and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0`, including the admin sign-in verification path.

`make converge-serverclaw` completed successfully with final recap `coolify-lv3 : ok=79 changed=5 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=81 changed=2 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=45 changed=4 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=272 changed=3 failed=0`.

notes: This branch-local receipt preserves the first settled ADR 0294 live replay before the protected release and canonical-truth surfaces are refreshed from the latest `origin/main` lineage.

Exact-main integration still needs to replay or reverify from the latest `origin/main` baseline and then update `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `RELEASE.md`, `docs/release-notes/`, `README.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, and the canonical mainline receipt together.
